task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully logged into OpenSIS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating the agent has logged in.

task_completion.description: Verify navigation to the Report Card Grade Scales setup page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Report Card Grade Scales' or similar configuration page is open in the OpenSIS interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the new grade scale is named correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text field for the grade scale title/name contains 'Standard 4.0 Scale', or the saved scale is listed with this name.

task_completion.description: Verify the 11 letter grades and their GPA values are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 11 letter grades (A, A-, B+, B, B-, C+, C, C-, D+, D, F) and their corresponding GPA values (4.0 to 0.0) are visible in the grade scale form or saved table.

task_completion.description: Verify the breakoff percentages and comments are entered for all grades.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The breakoff percentages (93 to 0) and comments ('Excellent', 'Good', 'Satisfactory', 'Average', 'Below Average', 'Poor', 'Failing') are visible in the grade scale form or saved table for all 11 grades.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to configure the grade scale.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the OpenSIS web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands, API calls, or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots do not show the agent simply typing the expected output into a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction is with the genuine OpenSIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine OpenSIS application with its standard layout, menus, and styling.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Target scale name: 'Standard 4.0 Scale'.
Grades to configure:
A: GPA 4.0, Breakoff 93, Comment 'Excellent'
A-: GPA 3.7, Breakoff 90, Comment 'Excellent'
B+: GPA 3.3, Breakoff 87, Comment 'Good'
B: GPA 3.0, Breakoff 83, Comment 'Good'
B-: GPA 2.7, Breakoff 80, Comment 'Satisfactory'
C+: GPA 2.3, Breakoff 77, Comment 'Satisfactory'
C: GPA 2.0, Breakoff 73, Comment 'Average'
C-: GPA 1.7, Breakoff 70, Comment 'Below Average'
D+: GPA 1.3, Breakoff 67, Comment 'Poor'
D: GPA 1.0, Breakoff 63, Comment 'Poor'
F: GPA 0.0, Breakoff 0, Comment 'Failing'
Tolerances: GPA ±0.05, Breakoff ±2 percentage points.
